title: cyathea sarawakensis
intro: Cyathea sarawakensis, also known as the Sarawak tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. This plant is native to Borneo and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea sarawakensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often dried and used to make tea or infusions, while its leaves are used to make a tincture or decoction.
